# Aesthetix Studio
# https://aesthetixstudio.dev

## What We Do
Aesthetix Studio is a web design and brand identity agency in Hyderabad, India. We build conversion-focused websites, brand systems, and digital products for startups and growing businesses.

## Key Metrics
- 80+ brands launched across 12 industries
- 42% average conversion rate lift within first 90 days
- 4.2× average ROI for clients within 6 months
- 6+ years in operation (founded 2021)
- 4.9/5 rating on Clutch with 50+ verified reviews
- Based in Falaknuma, Hyderabad, Telangana 500053, India

## Services
- Web Design — Custom responsive websites built to convert. Landing pages, corporate sites, SaaS marketing pages.
- Brand Identity — Logo design, brand guidelines, visual systems, and brand strategy.
- Web Development — React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Cloudflare infrastructure. Full-stack applications.
- Product Design — UI/UX design for SaaS products, mobile apps, and dashboards.
- Design Systems — Scalable component libraries, design tokens, and documentation.
- E-Commerce — Online stores, checkout flows, payment integration (Razorpay).

## Process
1. Discovery — Understanding your business goals, audience, and competitive landscape
2. Strategy — Defining the approach, information architecture, and conversion paths
3. Design — Visual design, prototyping, and stakeholder feedback
4. Development — Clean code, performance optimization, and responsive build
5. Launch — Deployment, analytics setup, and post-launch support

## Notable Case Studies

### PhysioCore (Healthcare)
- Problem: Low online bookings, generic template website
- Solution: Professional landing page with booking-focused UX
- Results: +68% online bookings, 42% conversion rate (up from 1.8%), 3.2× monthly lead increase
- Tech: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, GitHub Pages

### Review Harvest (SaaS)
- Problem: Businesses struggling to manage reviews across platforms
- Solution: Complete SaaS platform for automated review collection and smart routing
- Results: 10k+ businesses served, +180% Google reviews for clients, 127 reviews/month per business
- Tech: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Vercel, SMS/Email API

### Aurelia (Creative Portfolio)
- Problem: Forgettable portfolio, 0.8% inquiry conversion rate
- Solution: Immersive awwwards-style portfolio with scroll animations
- Results: 5.2× more inbound leads, 4:32 avg. session duration (up from 1:10), 3 Awwwards features
- Tech: React, GSAP, Framer Motion, Tailwind CSS

### LuxeTech (E-Commerce)
- Problem: Commerce teams building UI from scratch, expensive and slow
- Solution: Premium ecommerce UI component library and design system
- Results: 87% faster launches, ₹12L+ saved per client, 340+ teams adopted
- Tech: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion

### The Chronicle (Publishing)
- Problem: Legacy newspaper losing readers to digital-native outlets
- Solution: Complete digital experience redesign with subscription platform
- Results: 12M monthly readers (up from 2M), 8% paywall conversion (up from 2%), 340% subscription growth
- Tech: Next.js, Sanity CMS, Stripe, Vercel

### Saffron Kitchen (Restaurant)
- Problem: Exceptional food but generic brand identity
- Solution: Complete brand identity and digital presence
- Results: +180% weeknight covers, 4.8★ Google rating (up from 4.2), 95% rebooking rate
- Tech: Squarespace, Instagram, OpenTable

### Meridian Systems (Enterprise SaaS)
- Problem: World-class AI platform but "startup" website impression
- Solution: Enterprise-grade digital presence with trust architecture
- Results: 3× enterprise demos, SOC 2 compliance, 200k active users
- Tech: Next.js, TypeScript, Storybook, Vercel

### Mono Studio (Design Agency)
- Problem: Agency with great work but generic website
- Solution: Radical minimalism — stripped to essentials
- Results: +3× inbound leads, 4.9s avg. time on site (up from 1.2s), 100 Lighthouse score
- Tech: HTML, CSS, Vanilla JS, Netlify

### ClimateBridge (Sustainability SaaS)
- Problem: Technical product page, enterprise prospects couldn't understand value
- Solution: User-centric platform redesign with interactive demo
- Results: 60% faster CSRD/CDP reporting, 2M+ tonnes tracked, 98 PageSpeed score
- Tech: React, TypeScript, D3.js, Tailwind CSS

### Maison Aurélien (Luxury)
- Problem: Heritage maison with invisible online presence
- Solution: Digital experience worthy of Swiss watchmaking craft
- Results: +180% revenue first quarter, 45% configurator usage, Featured on LVMH Innovation
- Tech: Next.js, Shopify, GSAP, Sanity CMS, Cloudflare

## Pricing
- Starter: From ₹25,000 — Landing page, brand basics
- Growth: From ₹75,000 — Multi-page site, CMS, SEO
- Enterprise: Custom — Full brand + web + product package

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- Backend: Cloudflare Workers, Cloudflare D1 (SQLite)
- Payments: Razorpay (live production keys)
- Auth: Supabase (JWT-based)
- Analytics: Google Analytics (GA4), Microsoft Clarity
- Hosting: Vercel (frontend) + Cloudflare Workers (API)
